allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json lines = sys.stdin.read\(\).strip\(\).split\('\\n'\) for line in lines[-20:]: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) if obj.get\('type'\) in ['human', 'assistant']: role = obj.get\('type', ''\) content = obj.get\('content', ''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\(f'[{role}]: {c[\\"text\\"][:300]}'\) elif isinstance\(content, str\): print\(f'[{role}]: {content[:300]}'\) except: pass ")

Bash(node -e "const { chromium } = require\('playwright-core'\); chromium.launch\({ headless: true }\).then\(b => { console.log\('Playwright OK'\); b.close\(\); }\).catch\(e => console.log\('Playwright fail:', e.message\)\)")
